seoTitle: Sandy Point vs Sans Souci — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sandy Point and Sans Souci. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sandy Point vs Sans Souci: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sandy Point and Sans Souci.
heading: Sandy Point vs Sans Souci — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sandy Point, New South Wales and Sans Souci, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sandy Point has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Sans Souci (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sandy Point or Sans Souci safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sandy Point has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Sans Souci scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sandy Point scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Sans Souci scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sandy Point or Sans Souci?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sandy Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
